advanced_machine_features.description: Configures advanced machine features such as nested virtualization and core/thread settings; optional and can be left null.

allow_stopping_for_update.description: Allows stopping the instance during an update to apply changes; defaults to false if not specified.

attached_disk.description: Defines the configuration of disks to attach to the instance, including encryption and source details; the 'source' field is required.
attached_disk.type: list(object({device_name: optional(string),disk_encryption_key_raw: optional(string),disk_encryption_key_sha256: optional(string),kms_key_self_link: optional(string),mode: optional(string),source: string}))

boot_disk.description: Specifies the configuration of the instance's boot disk, including encryption, size, and initialization parameters; some fields are optional.
boot_disk.type: list(object({auto_delete: optional(bool),device_name: optional(string),disk_encryption_key_raw: optional(string),disk_encryption_key_sha256: optional(string),interface: optional(string),kms_key_self_link: optional(string),mode: optional(string),source: optional(string),initialize_params: list(object({enable_confidential_compute: optional(bool),image: optional(string),labels: optional(map(string)),provisioned_iops: optional(number),provisioned_throughput: optional(number),resource_manager_tags: optional(map(string)),resource_policies: optional(list(string)),size: optional(number),storage_pool: optional(string),type: optional(string)}))}))

can_ip_forward.description: Enables or disables IP forwarding for the instance; useful for networking or routing purposes.

confidential_instance_config.description: Defines settings for confidential computing, including whether the instance is confidential and its type.

deletion_protection.description: Prevents accidental deletion of the instance when enabled.

description.description: Provides an optional human-readable description for the instance.

desired_status.description: Specifies the desired status of the instance, such as 'RUNNING' or 'TERMINATED'.

enable_display.description: Enables a virtual display device for the instance; applicable for GUI-based workloads.

guest_accelerator.description: Configures attached GPUs, including the type and count required for the instance.

hostname.description: Specifies a custom hostname for the instance; must comply with DNS naming conventions.

key_revocation_action_type.description: Determines the action to take if the encryption key is revoked, such as shutting down the instance.

labels.description: A set of key-value pairs used for organizing and categorizing the instance.

machine_type.description: Specifies the machine type for the instance, determining its hardware configuration; must match available types in the selected zone.

metadata.description: A map of metadata key-value pairs to associate with the instance; used for configuration and automation.

metadata_startup_script.description: Specifies a startup script to be executed when the instance boots.

min_cpu_platform.description: Specifies the minimum CPU platform for the instance, such as 'Intel Skylake'; optional but must match supported platforms.

name.description: A unique name for the instance, required and must comply with naming conventions.

network_interface.description: Defines network interfaces for the instance, including IP configurations and access settings; supports multiple interfaces.
network_interface.type: list(object({internal_ipv6_prefix_length: optional(number),ipv6_access_type: optional(string),ipv6_address: optional(string),name: optional(string),network: optional(string),network_attachment: optional(string),network_ip: optional(string),nic_type: optional(string),queue_count: optional(number),stack_type: optional(string),subnetwork: optional(string),subnetwork_project: optional(string),access_config: list(object({nat_ip: optional(string),network_tier: optional(string),public_ptr_domain_name: optional(string)})),alias_ip_range: list(object({ip_cidr_range: string,subnetwork_range_name: optional(string)})),ipv6_access_config: list(object({external_ipv6: optional(string),external_ipv6_prefix_length: optional(string),name: optional(string),network_tier: string,public_ptr_domain_name: optional(string)}))}))

network_performance_config.description: Specifies the network performance settings for the instance, such as egress bandwidth tier.

params.description: Additional parameters for the resource, including optional tags for resource management.

reservation_affinity.description: Configures reservation affinity settings, including specific reservation requirements for the instance.

resource_policies.description: A list of resource policies to apply to the instance, such as backup or maintenance policies.

scheduling.description: Defines scheduling options for the instance, including preemption and maintenance behavior.
scheduling.type: list(object({automatic_restart: optional(bool),availability_domain: optional(number),instance_termination_action: optional(string),min_node_cpus: optional(number),on_host_maintenance: optional(string),preemptible: optional(bool),provisioning_model: optional(string),termination_time: optional(string),local_ssd_recovery_timeout: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),max_run_duration: list(object({nanos: optional(number),seconds: number})),node_affinities: list(object({key: string,operator: string,values: list(string)})),on_instance_stop_action: list(object({discard_local_ssd: optional(bool)}))}))

scratch_disk.description: Defines configurations for scratch disks, including size and interface type; optional for ephemeral storage.

service_account.description: Specifies the service account and its scopes for the instance; required for accessing Google Cloud services.

shielded_instance_config.description: Configures Shielded VM settings for enhanced security, such as enabling secure boot and vTPM.

source_instance_template.description: Specifies the instance template to use for creating the instance; required and must reference an existing template.

tags.description: A list of network tags to associate with the instance for firewall and routing purposes.

timeouts.description: Customizes resource operation timeouts for creation, updates, or deletions.

zone.description: Specifies the zone where the instance should be created; must match available zones in the selected region.
